description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a job named trace-pipeline in the automation stage that extends the .with-bundle and .common-ci-tokens templates, retries once, and runs only when the $TRACE_PIPELINE variable is set, delaying execution by 5 seconds. The job defines a GITLAB_O11Y_URL variable pointing to https://observe.gitlab.com/v3/9970/430285/ingest/traces, then runs the shell command bundle exec rake "trace:pipeline_url[$PIPELINE_URL,$SERVICE_NAME]". It inherits its Docker image and services from the extended templates.
